text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Heeelp! Ideas for a date with Rubae, go! Tea?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ughh, your girl's getting perma rejected! I am
literally grasping at straws here! She low-key
refuses to even look my way!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: But I just... I wanna take her out on a date! I wanna have fun! I want her to have fun! Like... gahhh, I am so down bad!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Nghh... Okay, I got this! Got any lovely tea fit for
a lady on you? Let's put our heads together!
